title: RPP GitHub Action Inputs
description: Inputs for the Robotic Property Photographer GitHub Action (Snapshots workflow). Applies to both workflow_dispatch manual triggers and repository_dispatch client_payload objects. The full schema for the job_json payload is defined in job-payload.schema.json.

job_json.description: JSON-encoded render job specification. Must be a valid JSON string that deserializes to either a single job object or a single-element array containing one job object. See job-payload.schema.json for the full schema of the parsed payload.

resumeUrl.description: Webhook callback URL automatically injected by n8n dispatchAndWait. When non-empty the workflow POSTs {"run_id": "<github_run_id>"} to this URL upon successful completion.

snapshot_mode.description: Controls which camera shots are captured. Defaults to 'all'.
snapshot_mode.$comment: overhead_only → 1 shot (overhead); overhead_north → 2 shots (overhead, north); all → 5 shots (overhead, north, east, south, west)
